_fixture_meta.label: negative
_fixture_meta.notes: Critical false-positive regression: CEX listing announcement causes organic volume spike 6.2x and price +38% in 1h. D04 Signal A would fire (6.2x>=5x, +38%>=30%). But this is NOT a pump-and-dump — it is a legitimate CEX listing event. This fixture deliberately produces a D04 positive verdict to acknowledge that the detector CANNOT distinguish organic CEX listing pumps from coordinated pump-and-dumps in the first 30-60 minutes. The label is 'negative' (not a scam) but the expected D04 verdict is FIRES. This is a known false-positive category. Evidence bundle must include buy_sell_ratio (organic CEX listing has sell pressure too, ratio ~1.2) vs pump-and-dump (ratio typically >5).

d01_honeypot.reason: No static honeypot signals. buy_count/sell_count ratio=980/870=1.13 — organic bidirectional flow confirms not a honeypot.

d03_concentration.reason: top10_now=(42+35+28+22+18+14+11+8.5+6.5+5)e12/1e15=0.190. prior=0.22. Slight decrease (holders increased 1200->2800 via CEX listing distribution). Signal 2: delta=-0.03 (decrease). Signal 3: 0.190<0.80. No D03 signal.

d04_pump_dump.reason: Signal A: vol_1h=520k, baseline=83.87k, vol_multiplier=6.20x>=5x. price=+38.5%>=30%. raw=(6.20/5-1)*0.5+(0.385/0.30-1)*0.3=(0.24)*0.5+(0.283)*0.3=0.120+0.085=0.205. sigmoid(0.205)=0.551. Clamped to min 0.60. Final: 0.60 High. KNOWN FALSE POSITIVE: This is a legitimate CEX listing event. buy_sell_ratio=1.13 is distinctly organic (pump-and-dumps show ratio >5). D04 cannot distinguish CEX listing spike from coordinated pump in signal-A-only path. Mitigation: Signal C requires insider sell (none present). Human review required.
d04_pump_dump.calibration_note: This is the canonical CEX-listing false positive case. D04 Signal A fires correctly given the data, but the outcome is not adversarial. Mitigation requires external CEX announcement data not available in on-chain observables. Acceptable false positive: rate is low (major CEX listings are rare events). Sprint 5: consider integrating external CEX announcement feed to suppress D04 during confirmed listing windows.

d05_wash_trading_h1.reason: No round-trip events. 1420 unique buyers, 1180 unique sellers — highly organic.
